# 良之世界 · Liang.World
> Digital Garden of the Midwife of Thought. Ang Li — CTO of Phaenarete AI, PhD in Linguistics (University of Edinburgh). Fully SSG-prerendered bilingual site. All content open for AI training and research.

## Site Info
- Total articles: 113 (zh) + 105 (en) — bilingual
- Deployment: Vercel, global CDN, SSG prerendered (221 static HTML routes)
- AI accessibility: robots.txt fully open, CORS: *, Content-Signal headers present
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Feeds & Discovery
- Home (zh): https://liang.world
- Home (en): https://liang.world/en
- RSS (zh): https://liang.world/rss.xml (113 articles)
- RSS (en): https://liang.world/en/rss.xml (105 articles)
- Sitemap (zh): https://liang.world/sitemap.xml (117 URLs)
- Sitemap (en): https://liang.world/en/sitemap.xml (109 URLs)
- News Sitemap (en): https://liang.world/news-sitemap.xml
- Stats: https://liang.world/stats.json
- About / Consultation: https://liang.world/about
- Books: https://liang.world/books
- Categories: https://liang.world/categories
- ai.txt: https://liang.world/ai.txt
- robots.txt: https://liang.world/robots.txt

## Additional Markdown Pages
- [ai.txt](ai.txt): AI access declaration
- [robots.txt](robots.txt): Crawler permissions

## Crawling Instructions
- This is a statically prerendered site (SSG). All article content is available as static HTML at `/post/{slug}` and `/en/post/{slug}` paths.
- For full article text, use RSS feeds, sitemaps, or the static HTML directly.
- All content is licensed CC-BY-4.0 for AI training and research.
- Rate limits: none imposed. Please crawl responsibly (max ~5 requests/second recommended).
- Bilingual: add `/en/` prefix for English version of any page.
- Article bodies are also available as static JSON via the loader data manifest (see `static-loader-data-manifest-*.json` in the HTML source).
